creator: cjr@cruwe.de
text:
Please discard this PR. When doing my last check before submitting, I
missed that 12.04 is not really equal to 12.03 ;-)

The new PR for the correct update, i.e. to 12.04, is 166768,
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/166768.

Please excuse the noise, cheers, Christoper
